title: stellaria uliginosa var. alpina
intro: Stellaria uliginosa var. alpina, also known as Alpine Stitchwort, is a perennial plant species within the primrose family that thrives in moist, mountainous regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Stellaria uliginosa var. alpina include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
